name: fairplay-cloud
description: FairPlay Cloud - Admin Dashboard for Fair Play Detection

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd fairplay-cloud-backend && npm install && npm run start
scripts.build:frontend: cd fairplay-cloud-frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.install: npm install && cd fairplay-cloud-backend && npm install && cd ../fairplay-cloud-frontend && npm install
